debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A B : Set U
h1 : B ⊆ A
h2 : ctble ↑A
⊢ ctble ↑B

proof:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  use λ b => f ⟨b.1, h1 b.2⟩
  intros b1 b2 h
  have h' := hf _ _ h
  apply Subtype.ext
  injection h'
failed_attempts:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  use λ x => f ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩
  intros x y h
  exact Subtype.ext (congrArg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h))

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  exact ⟨λ x => f ⟨x.1, h1 x.2⟩, λ x y h => Subtype.ext (congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h))⟩

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  cases' h2 with f hf
  use f ∘ (λ x => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩)
  intros x y h
  apply Subtype.ext
  exact Subtype.ext_iff.1 (hf h)

by
